subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which We have revealed in truth, that it may bring glad tidings to mankind of this wondrous Day. All things have rejoiced at the Manifestation of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق لیبشر الناس بهذا الیوم البدیع قد استفرح کل شیء بظهور الله
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
